view.title: Validate explicit UC need #6

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 6 blocked

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The requirement to validate 'Revenue protection (better 50% than 0%)' is not directly supported by the evidence provided. While the linked use case describes a scenario involving discounts and bookings, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the system effectively calculates or guarantees a revenue protection mechanism that meets the specified threshold. The prior steps indicate successful bookings, but they do not confirm the specific revenue protection aspect, leading to an inconclusive status.
